reason: QA test for GitHub username verification via agent with account access grant
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Success. App loaded with sidebar showing agents.
Step 2 - Clicked on agent "QA-20260319-200610-yct9" in the sidebar - Success. Agent detail page loaded showing landing page to start conversation.
Step 3 - Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Success. Agent status shows "idle" (blue dot indicator in header).
Step 4 - Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Success. Message was submitted and a new session "GitHub Username Verification Session" was created.

Step 5 - GitHub account access card appeared and I selected GitHub account and granted access - Success. Card displayed with GitHub account option, checkbox was checked, and "Grant Access (1)" button was clicked.
Step 6 - Waited up to 4 minutes for agent response - Success. Agent completed response in 38 seconds (well within the 4-minute limit). Agent status remained "idle" after completion.

Step 7 - Verified response includes GitHub username and took screenshot - Success. Agent response clearly states: "Your GitHub username is **yiw190**. You're on the Pro plan with 3 public repos and 12 private repos." Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with the username visible.
